title: KoreanRefreshed
description: Optimizing Korean character rendering with true pixel fonts.
body:
# KoreanRefreshed
This Resource Pack uses the true pixel font ‘Neo둥근모’ for displaying Korean characters. Perfectly matches the vanilla Latin typeface (aka 'Minecraft Seven') style, enhances the consistency of the in-game text display, and improves the gaming experience.

![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b914464b1c09afdeebedd6a9275c4fd17a409fbb.jpeg)
# Credit
Based on '[Neo둥근모](https://github.com/neodgm/neodgm)' by neodgm.
